title: Remotion hero composition pass
description: Blocked on motion design: hero composition, timing, fallback crop. Needs creative iteration not CSS-only.
close_reason: Hero final-frame hold, light top feather, ended listener

title: Light-mode parity sweep
description: Follow-up: audit [data-theme=light] blocks in routes.css/surfaces.css for contrast mismatches.

title: IconTile CSS deduplication
description: Follow-up: consolidate shell.css .icon-tile with IconTile.module.css single source. Risk: sidebar/nav regression. Non-goal: visual redesign.

title: Blog and contact surface polish
description: Surface: blog index, about, contact. Problem: prose measure and mobile card spacing. Outcome: editorial parity. Files: content.css, contact.module.css. Checks: manual QA.
close_reason: Contact hint contrast, pageHero lede tokens

title: Breakpoint and token cleanup
description: Surface: global CSS. Problem: 720/820px legacy queries, orphan .now__ rules. Outcome: canonical 768/1024 scale. Files: routes.css, content.css. Checks: quality.

title: Card system token alignment
description: Surface: ArticleCard, ProjectCard, IconTile, DockLink. Problem: dual CSS paths, legacy image sizes breakpoints. Outcome: token-aligned cards with focus rings. Files: ProjectCard.astro, ArticleCard.astro, DockLink.module.css. Checks: test:unit, build.
close_reason: Card breakpoints and DockLink focus aligned

title: Typography and section rhythm
description: Surface: home sections. Problem: tight section gaps, tertiary caption color. Outcome: stronger hierarchy via spacing tokens. Files: routes.css, section.css. Checks: visual QA 390-1280px.
close_reason: Section rhythm and caption hierarchy improved

title: Shell and navigation polish
description: Surface: Base.astro shell, topbar, mobile liquid nav. Problem: focus parity on dock tiles. Outcome: consistent focus rings. Files: shell.css, DockLink.module.css. Checks: quality, a11y spot-check.

title: Hero and first-impression elevation
description: Surface: home hero + hero-bridge. Problem: scroll cue low contrast, hero-to-content transition abrupt. Outcome: calmer premium first impression. Files: surfaces.css, routes.css. Checks: quality, build, mobile QA.
close_reason: Hero scroll cue, hero-bridge spacing implemented

title: Mobile Liquid Glass bottom tab nav
